response.global_analysis:
1. Speech and Song Match: Transcribed the initial speech segment and successfully matched the performance to the original song 'Kiseki Musubi'.
2. Reference Discrepancies Corrected: Fixed acoustic details where the reference lyrics deviated from the actual sung vocals (e.g., corrected 'ウェットして' to 'リセットして' and transcribed the final sequence '僕らの声を聞いて ずっと ずっと' which was missing/incorrect in the basic reference).
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with visual title card translated during the pre-song transition. No cascading delays occur.

subtitles.original: って、みんながね、たくさん聴いてくれたおかげと言いますか、本当にありがとうございました...
subtitles.english: It's all thanks to everyone listening to it so much... Thank you so very much...

subtitles.original: と思っています。
subtitles.english: That's how I feel.

subtitles.original: えー、みんなね、あの...
subtitles.english: Also, everyone...

subtitles.original: このあとですね、あの、22時20分から、最後の「歌ってみた」...
subtitles.english: After this, at 22:20, my last cover song video...

subtitles.original: みんなと約束してました、あの、動画消えちゃって歌い直そうって言っていた、あの、「KING」を投稿するので絶対見てくださいね！
subtitles.english: I'm posting "KING," which I promised to re-record after the video got deleted, so please make sure to watch it!

subtitles.original: ふぅ...
subtitles.english: Whew...

subtitles.original: 毎日は一緒にいてくれたへい民、ホロライブの大好きなメンバーたち、そしてたくさん支えてくださった、本当にお世話になった方々全ての方に感謝しています。
subtitles.english: I'm grateful to the Heimin who were with me every day, my beloved Hololive members, and everyone who supported and took care of me.

subtitles.original: 夢のような時間を本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for this dream-like time!

subtitles.original: こころこ...ここで噛むのね。子供の頃の「アイドルになりたい」という夢が、作詞作曲をしてみたいという夢を、叶いました。
subtitles.english: My hea... I had to stumble here. My childhood dream of becoming an idol and my dream of writing and composing songs have come true.

subtitles.original: そして、最後の曲ですが、まだ歌うんですよ。
subtitles.english: And now for the final song, but I'm still going to sing.

subtitles.original: 僕が初めて作詞作曲した楽曲があります。
subtitles.english: There is a song that I wrote and composed for the first time.

subtitles.original: 今はいない同期、ココの卒業に合わせて、4期生のトワ、ルーナ、わために捧げた楽曲です。
subtitles.english: To mark the graduation of our generation-mate Coco, who is no longer here, I dedicated this song to 4th generation's Towa, Luna, and Watame.

subtitles.original: 前を向いて笑顔で、この楽曲で活動を最後にしたいと思います。
subtitles.english: I would like to bring my activities to a close with this song, looking forward with a smile.

subtitles.original: それでは聴いてください。「キセキ結び」！
subtitles.english: Now, please listen to: "Kiseki Musubi"!

subtitles.original: キセキ結び
subtitles.english: [Song: Kiseki Musubi]

subtitles.original: 約束しようよ 僕ら出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Let's make a promise, so we won't forget the miracle of our meeting.

subtitles.original: 忘れないように
subtitles.english: So that we never forget.

subtitles.original: 夢抱いて集う 青春アニメみたいに
subtitles.english: Gathering with dreams, like in a youth anime,

subtitles.original: HAPPYなエンドになる 彼方へ飛ぶよ
subtitles.english: it'll be a happy ending. I will fly towards the distance.

subtitles.original: 寝ぼけ眼アクビして 今日は何をしようか
subtitles.english: Yawning with sleepy eyes, what should we do today?

subtitles.original: 永遠に続く海を 駆け抜ける
subtitles.english: Running through the endless sea...

subtitles.original: 今はため息よりも 勇気を
subtitles.english: Now, courage rather than sighs.

subtitles.original: 諦めるなんてないの
subtitles.english: There's no such thing as giving up.

subtitles.original: ここで歌う僕の声は聞こえてますか？
subtitles.english: Can you hear my voice singing here?

subtitles.original: 君に届け
subtitles.english: May it reach you.

subtitles.original: 学校の友達じゃ きっとなかった出会いだった
subtitles.english: It was an encounter we surely wouldn't have had if we were just school friends.

subtitles.original: 何年も先の 遥か遠くまで
subtitles.english: To the far distance, years ahead,

subtitles.original: ささくれた言葉も 誰かの笑顔になる
subtitles.english: even splintered words can bring a smile to someone.

subtitles.original: それぞれの色で 星結ぶ奇跡
subtitles.english: With our own colors, the miracle of tying stars,

subtitles.original: キラキラ輝く ステージに連れてくよ
subtitles.english: I'll take you to the glittering stage.

subtitles.original: 泣いて笑ってはしゃいで 毎日がジェットコースター
subtitles.english: Crying, laughing, having fun, every day is a roller coaster.

subtitles.original: たまにはね 寝転んで お昼寝しよう
subtitles.english: Sometimes, let's just lie down and take a nap.

subtitles.original: ちょっと自信ないとき こっそり泣いてリセットして
subtitles.english: When I lack confidence, I'll secretly cry and reset.

subtitles.original: 今日だけは泣いちゃうこと 許してね
subtitles.english: Please forgive me for crying just for today.

subtitles.original: 未来の僕が アルバム開く
subtitles.english: My future self opens the album.

subtitles.original: 傷ついた写真だって 宝物だ
subtitles.english: Even the hurt pictures are treasures.

subtitles.original: 僕の愛は見えていますか？
subtitles.english: Can you see my love?

subtitles.original: 君に届け
subtitles.english: May it reach you.

subtitles.original: 過去も個性も 性格も違うけれど
subtitles.english: Though our pasts, personalities, and characters are different,

subtitles.original: 夜明けが来るときは 瞼ぎゅっと瞑り
subtitles.english: when dawn comes, close your eyes tight.

subtitles.original: もう1回 もう1回 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: One more time, one more time, I will never give up.

subtitles.original: 前を向く背中を追う 下手くそな僕でも
subtitles.english: Even if I'm clumsy at chasing the back of someone looking forward,

subtitles.original: 君の隣にいたくて 走るよ
subtitles.english: I run because I want to be by your side.

subtitles.original: 誰にも言えずに 描いた夢が
subtitles.english: The dream I painted without telling anyone,

subtitles.original: たとえ叶わないとしても
subtitles.english: even if it doesn't come true,

subtitles.original: ボロボロの靴でも カッコよくなくても ああ
subtitles.english: even with worn-out shoes, even if it's not cool, ah...

subtitles.original: おそろい あの日の僕ならなんて言う
subtitles.english: All together, what would my self from that day say?

subtitles.original: 「止まらないで」
subtitles.english: “Don't stop”

subtitles.original: 初めて僕らが出会った日
subtitles.english: The day we met for the first time,

subtitles.original: まるで昨日のことみたいに思い出すけど
subtitles.english: I can remember it like it was yesterday, but...

subtitles.original: もう行こうか 最後に今
subtitles.english: Shall we go now? At last, now,

subtitles.original: 重なるキセキ
subtitles.english: over-lapping miracles.

subtitles.original: 僕らの声を 聞いて ずっと ずっと
subtitles.english: Listen to our voices, forever and ever.
